data.dedup: none (official benchmark protocol; duplicates kept, train/test sample_id intersection verified 0 in v2)
data.split: official time-based split: test.csv = last week's click events; no re-splitting

excluded_fields.l_c_fea: absent from unaligned file (shared-bottom consistency would break); paper labels it conversion-event timestamp, target-leakage semantics

features.vocab: built per-party locally; label party vocab from aligned train + unaligned sample; non-label party vocab from aligned train; index 0 reserved for OOV/UNK; min_count 1

sampling.unaligned_train: random sample target 2,000,000 rows, rate 2000000/10424346 per chunk, numpy PCG64 seed 42

model.backbone: paper VanillaVFL protocol (SIGIR23 sec 5.1.4), numpy reimplementation
model.top: single logistic layer on concat [h_N(32); h_L(128)]
model.optimizer: Adam lr=1e-3 beta=(0.9,0.999) eps=1e-8, lazy update for embedding tables
model.class_rebalancing: none (paper protocol; preserves calibration, NLL reported on raw probabilities)

phase4_enhancement.synthesized_embedding: per-user average of aligned h_N from pretrained VanillaVFL; fallback global mean h_N for unseen users
phase4_enhancement.user_id_field: resolved in phase1 audit: highest-cardinality l_u field with aligned/unaligned overlap

DP_gaussian.clip: per-sample L2 clip at batch median norm

phase5_privacy.metric: DeltaLeakAUC = (LeakAUC_exp - LeakAUC_base) / LeakAUC_base; utility = test AUC

value_quantification.primary: fixed-budget incremental captured conversions: DeltaCapture@K x total test conversions (test window = 1 week), annualized x52
value_quantification.conversion_value_sensitivity: V in {50, 100, 200, 500} CNY per conversion, declared assumption
value_quantification.net_value: incremental value minus communication + defense utility cost (both measured)
